definition:
1. to strike against , τινί (Plato Philosophus):absolute to stumble, fail , (Plutarch) 
2. to have a collision with  another, give offence , (Demosthenes Orator); πρ. τινί (Plutarch) 
3. to take offence at, be angry with , τινί (Demosthenes Orator), etc.: —;absolute to take offence , (Plato Philosophus) (ML)
